title: I Spy
excerpt: Spotted some fun projects using our products. Can't thank you enough for sharing your creativity. Our products are available online at Two Peas In A Bucket and hopefully at your local scrapbooking stores. I've been seeing a few photos popping…
body:
Spotted some fun projects using our products. Can't thank you enough for sharing your creativity.

Our products are available online at Two Peas In A Bucket and hopefully at your local scrapbooking stores. I've been seeing a few photos popping up from Spotlight stores (in Australia and New Zealand!). If you happen to post any photos with our products on Instagram, feel free to use the hashtag - #amytangerine.
